breaks.scene_hint: The romantic world-building and initial introductions have settled — a quieter character interaction moment between the two leads
A mid-story scene transition between two plot threads — likely a lull between dramatic beats

A reflective, slower-paced dialogue scene — the story pauses before building toward the emotional climax

relaxed_breaks.scene_hint: Early world-building scenes wrapping up — background scenery and lighter dialogue moments
